sections.paragraph: μήτε [μή, τέ; ‘and not’] negative marker foreclosing a conceived option in continuation after a preceding negative and subject to such rendering as neither, nor, either, or, depending on requirements of standard Engl. usage, e.g. μή... μήτε not... nor Lk 7:33; and especially in series like μήτε... μήτε (and variation in quantity of μήτε) neither/either... nor/or, etc. Mt 11:18; Lk 9:3; Ac 23:8; 2 Th 2:2; 1 Ti 1:7; Hb 7:3; Js 5:12; Rv 7:1, 3.
